attributes.title: HTTP requests by service
attributes.visState: {"title": "HTTP requests by service", "type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "service.name", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 10, "otherBucket": false, "missingBucket": false}}], "params": {"perPage": 10, "showTotal": true, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "totalFunc": "sum"}}

attributes.title: HTTP transaction latency (avg µs) over time by service
attributes.visState: {"title": "HTTP transaction latency", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "transaction.duration.us", "customLabel": "avg duration (\u00b5s)"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "min_doc_count": 1}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "service.name", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 5, "otherBucket": false, "missingBucket": false}}], "params": {"addTimeMarker": false, "addLegend": true, "addTooltip": true}}

attributes.title: HTTP response status codes
attributes.visState: {"title": "HTTP response status codes", "type": "pie", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "http.response.status_code", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 10, "otherBucket": false, "missingBucket": false}}], "params": {"isDonut": true, "addLegend": true, "addTooltip": true}}

attributes.title: HTTP failed transactions over time
attributes.visState: {"title": "HTTP failed transactions", "type": "histogram", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "min_doc_count": 1}}], "params": {"addLegend": true, "addTooltip": true}}

attributes.title: Outbox health (backlog & dead letters)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Outbox health", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "sales.outbox.backlog", "customLabel": "Sales backlog"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "sales.outbox.deadletters", "customLabel": "Sales dead letters"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "inventory.outbox.backlog", "customLabel": "Inventory backlog"}}, {"id": "4", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "inventory.outbox.deadletters", "customLabel": "Inventory dead letters"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "None", "labels": {"show": true}}}}

attributes.title: Messaging throughput (cumulative)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Messaging throughput", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "sales.outbox.published", "customLabel": "Sales published"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "sales.outbox.failed", "customLabel": "Sales failed"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "sales.inbox.duplicate", "customLabel": "Sales inbox duplicates"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"labels": {"show": true}, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "None"}}}

attributes.title: Inventory reservation outcomes (cumulative)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Inventory reservation outcomes", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "inventory.reservation.reserved", "customLabel": "Reserved"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "inventory.reservation.rejected", "customLabel": "Rejected"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "inventory.reservation.released", "customLabel": "Released"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"labels": {"show": true}, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "None"}}}

attributes.title: Expired-order cancellation job (cumulative)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Expired-order cancellation job", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "sales.orders.expiration.scanned", "customLabel": "Scanned"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "sales.orders.expiration.cancelled", "customLabel": "Cancelled"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "sales.orders.expiration.skipped", "customLabel": "Skipped"}}, {"id": "4", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "sales.orders.expiration.failed", "customLabel": "Failed"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"labels": {"show": true}, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "None"}}}

attributes.title: Sales Management Reliability
attributes.description: HTTP/API, distributed tracing, Outbox/Inbox and Inventory reliability for Sales and Inventory services.
